- **Option C:** Mandibular Third Molar
- From "[article-131904_8]", descriptions clarify that mandibular third molars ("J"), if present, exhibit structural variations including possible bicuspid traits but fundamentally don’t consistently feature five individual cusps since their configurations vary significantly among individuals.
